name: airbnb
one_line: Warm, photography-first marketplace with custom Cereal font, generous rounding, and three-layer warm shadows on a pure white canvas.

name: airtable
one_line: Swiss-precision enterprise platform with Haas font, blue-tinted shadows, positive letter-spacing, and a clean white navy-blue binary.

name: apple
one_line: Cinematic product-as-sculpture gallery with SF Pro optical sizing, black/gray alternation, pill CTAs, and translucent glass navigation.

name: bmw
one_line: Angular, zero-radius German engineering aesthetic with BMWTypeNext Light uppercase display, showroom photography rhythm, and blue-only interactive accents.

name: cal
one_line: Monochromatic grayscale confidence with Cal Sans geometric display, 11-definition multi-layer shadow system, and zero brand color.

name: claude
one_line: Literary salon aesthetic with Anthropic Serif headlines, parchment canvas, terracotta accent, organic hand-drawn illustrations, and ring-shadow depth.

name: clay
one_line: Artisanal B2B warmth with named swatch palette, Roobert font with 5 OpenType sets, rotateZ hover animations, and cream-canvas craft aesthetic.

name: clickhouse
one_line: Neon yellow-green on obsidian black terminal cockpit with Inter Black 900 at 96px, inset pressed-shadows, and maximum-contrast performance data.

name: cohere
one_line: Enterprise command deck with CohereText serif display, 22px signature card radius, chromatic restraint, and deep purple hero bands.

name: coinbase
one_line: Trustworthy crypto exchange with deep blue accent, four-font proprietary family, 56px pill buttons, and white-dark binary with minimal shadows.

name: composio
one_line: Nocturnal command center with near-invisible borders, bioluminescent cyan glows, dual abcDiatype/JetBrains Mono typography, and brutalist hard-offset shadows.

name: cursor
one_line: Warm code-editor elegance with CursorGothic display, jjannon serif body, berkeleyMono code, oklab perceptual borders, and warm cream canvas.

name: elevenlabs
one_line: Premium audio brochure with whisper-thin Waldenburg 300 display, sub-0.1 opacity shadow stacks, warm stone pill buttons, and Apple-like whitespace.

name: expo
one_line: Luminous developer gallery with monochrome palette, pill-shaped everything, extreme negative tracking at display, and product screenshots as sole color source.

name: ferrari
one_line: Digital editorial magazine with chiaroscuro dark/light alternation, surgically sparse Ferrari Red, FerrariSans proprietary type, and photo-journalism imagery.

name: figma
one_line: Design tool that designed itself with variable font figmaSans at unusual weight stops, black-and-white chrome, vibrant hero gradients, and dashed editor-style focus indicators.

name: framer
one_line: Cinematic dark canvas with GT Walsheim extreme -5.5px tracking, Framer Blue electric accent, frosted glass buttons, and product screenshots as hero art.

name: hashicorp
one_line: Enterprise infrastructure with multi-product color system, HashiCorp Sans 600-700 headings, micro-shadow whisper depth, and dark hero/product duality.

name: ibm
one_line: Carbon Design System engineering spec with IBM Plex Light display, token-driven --cds-* architecture, 0px button radius, and blue-only interactive accent.

name: intercom
one_line: AI-first helpdesk with Saans extreme negative tracking, Fin Orange accent, sharp 4px buttons with scale(1.1) hover, and warm oat-toned borders.

name: kraken
one_line: Trustworthy crypto exchange with commanding purple brand, Kraken-Brand display font, 12px rounded buttons, and whisper-level shadow system.

name: lamborghini
one_line: Cathedral of darkness with LamboType 12-degree angled terminals, gold CTA exclusivity, hexagonal brand DNA, and all-caps 120px display headlines.

name: linear.app
one_line: Dark-mode-native precision instrument with Inter Variable cv01/ss03, signature weight 510, semi-transparent white borders, and indigo-violet as sole chromatic accent.

name: lovable
one_line: Warm cream notebook with Camera Plain Variable humanist font, opacity-driven color system, inset shadow buttons, and pill-shaped action elements.

name: minimax
one_line: Apple-meets-playground AI showcase with multi-font system, pill navigation, colorful product cards, and brand blue/pink accents on white canvas.

name: mintlify
one_line: Documentation-as-product with Inter tight tracking, Geist Mono uppercase labels, brand green atmospheric gradient hero, and ultra-round 24px card corners.

name: miro
one_line: Visual thinking platform with Roobert PRO OpenType variants, pastel coral/rose/teal palette, Blue 450 interactive, and generous 8-50px radius range.

name: mistral.ai
one_line: Sun-drenched European AI with golden-amber gradient block identity, 82px billboard headlines, warm golden shadows, and dramatic landscape photography.

name: mongodb
one_line: Forest-dark terminal with neon MongoDB Green, Value Serif editorial headlines, Source Code Pro wide-tracked labels, and teal-tinted forest shadows.

name: notion
one_line: Warm blank canvas with NotionInter negative tracking, whisper-weight rgba borders, ultra-thin 0.1 opacity division lines, and Notion Blue singular accent.

name: nvidia
one_line: GPU-rendered precision with NVIDIA Green signal borders, NVIDIA-EMEA industrial font, 1-2px sharp radius, and Font Awesome 900 sharp iconography.

name: ollama
one_line: Radical grayscale minimalism with SF Pro Rounded softness, 9999px pill everything, zero shadows, zero chromatic color, and monochrome llama mascot.

name: opencode.ai
one_line: Terminal-native monospace identity with Berkeley Mono everywhere, warm near-black reddish-brown canvas, 4px sharp radius, and Apple HIG semantic colors.

name: pinterest
one_line: Warm inspiration canvas with olive/sand neutrals, Pinterest Red bold accent, Pin Sans global font stack, 16-40px generous radius, and photography-first content.

name: posthog
one_line: Anti-corporate startup wiki with sage-olive warmth, IBM Plex Sans bold headings, hidden orange hover surprise, hand-drawn hedgehog illustrations, and content-heavy editorial layout.

name: raycast
one_line: Swiss-watch obsidian instrument with macOS-native inset shadow system, Raycast Red hero stripes, Inter positive tracking, and Radix UI primitives.

name: renault
one_line: Vibrant French automotive showroom with aurora gradient heroes, NouvelR proprietary geometric sans at bold weight, zero-radius buttons, and Renault Yellow super-primary CTAs.

name: replicate
one_line: Explosive developer playground with orange-red-magenta gradient hero, massive 128px display type in rb-freigeist-neue, exclusively pill-shaped geometry, and community-powered creative energy.

name: resend
one_line: Cinematic email infrastructure with Domaine Display 96px serif hero, icy blue-tinted borders, multi-color accent system, and pill-shaped transparent buttons.

name: revolut
one_line: Stadium-scale fintech with Aeonik Pro 136px display, universal 9999px pill buttons, comprehensive --rui-* semantic tokens, and zero shadows.

name: runwayml
one_line: Cinematic AI film reel with full-bleed photography as primary UI, single abcNormal font, zero shadows, invisible interface, and editorial magazine layout.

name: sanity
one_line: Nocturnal command center with waldenburgNormal extreme -4.48px tracking, pure achromatic grays, neon green and electric blue accent punctuation against the dark field.

name: sentry
one_line: Dark purple IDE aesthetic with Dammit Sans personality font, lime-green CTA, warm purple spectrum, frosted glass effects, and inset tactile button depth.

name: spacex
one_line: Full-screen cinematic aerospace with pure black canvas, D-DIN universal uppercase + positive tracking, spectral near-white text, and zero UI decoration.

name: spotify
one_line: Content-first dark theater with Spotify Green play button, CircularSp font family, pill/circle geometry, heavy 0.5-opacity shadows, and album art as primary color.

name: stripe
one_line: Gold-standard fintech with sohne-var ss01 at weight 300, blue-tinted multi-layer shadows, deep navy headings, and conservative 4-8px radius.

name: supabase
one_line: Dark-mode-native code editor with Circular rounded-terminal font, emerald green brand accent, HSL translucent layering, and pill CTAs contrasting 6px secondary radius.

name: superhuman
one_line: Luxury envelope with Super Sans VF non-standard weights, 0.96 ultra-tight display, warm cream buttons, lavender accent, and cinematic purple gradient hero.

name: tesla
one_line: Radical subtraction digital showroom with Universal Sans Display, single Electric Blue CTA, full-viewport car photography, and near-zero UI decoration.

name: together.ai
one_line: Pastel-gradient AI dreamscape with soft pink-blue-lavender hero, midnight-blue research sections, The Future font aggressive tracking, and sharp 4-8px geometry.

name: uber
one_line: Confident black-and-white minimalism with UberMove proprietary font, pill-shaped everything, warm human illustrations, and whisper-soft 0.12 opacity shadows.

name: vercel
one_line: Minimalist-as-engineering-principle with Geist Sans extreme -2.88px tracking, shadow-as-border philosophy, multi-layer shadow stacks, and workflow-specific accent colors.

name: voltagent
one_line: Deep-space command terminal with emerald green signal glow, warm-neutral grays preventing clinical coldness, system-ui headings and Inter body, and SFMono code credibility.

name: warp
one_line: Campfire-in-a-forest terminal with Matter geometric font, warm parchment text, nature photography interleaved with product shots, and almost monochromatic warm gray palette.

name: webflow
one_line: Tool-forward design platform with WF Visual Sans Variable, signature Webflow Blue, rich six-color secondary palette, 5-layer cascading shadows, and translate(6px) hover animations.

name: wise
one_line: Bold fintech with Wise Sans 900 at 126px and 0.85 ultra-tight line-height, lime-green nature-inspired CTAs, pill buttons, and scale(1.05) growing hover animations.

name: x.ai
one_line: Brutalist monospace minimalism with GeistMono at extraordinary 320px display, pure white-on-dark binary, zero decorative elements, and uppercase tracked button labels.

name: zapier
